title: The Motivation Factor: to Become Smart, Productive & Mentally Stable
original_title: The Motivation Factor: to Become Smart, Productive & Mentally Stable
overview: This award-winning documentary shows the irreplaceable role classical Physical Education plays to develop smart, productive and mentally stable citizens, and the out-of-control consequences we face today with its absence in our society.
